task_completion.description: Open the pre-loaded FZK-Haus IFC model in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender/BlenderBIM interface is open, displaying the 3D FZK-Haus model in the viewport and its elements in the Outliner.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Status' property to 'EXISTING' within 'Pset_WallCommon' for at least eight existing walls.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Object Properties panel (IFC Properties section) shows 'Pset_WallCommon' expanded with the 'Status' field explicitly set to 'EXISTING' for selected wall elements.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Status' property to 'DEMOLISH' within 'Pset_WallCommon' for at least one internal partition wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An internal partition wall is selected in the 3D viewport or Outliner, and the Object Properties panel shows 'Pset_WallCommon' with the 'Status' field set to 'DEMOLISH'.

task_completion.description: Model a new 'IfcWall' element in the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A newly created wall is visible in the 3D viewport or listed in the Outliner (increasing the total number of walls beyond the original 13).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Status' property to 'NEW' within 'Pset_WallCommon' for the newly modeled wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created wall is selected, and the Object Properties panel shows 'Pset_WallCommon' with the 'Status' field set to 'NEW'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated IFC project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save/export dialog or a confirmation message in the interface showing the file being saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_renovation_phased.ifc'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender/BlenderBIM graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active use of Blender's 3D viewport, Outliner, and Properties panels, rather than just terminal windows executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually inject IFC property strings into the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the IFC file opened in a plain text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) being manually edited.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created a new wall rather than just renaming or repurposing an existing one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Outliner or viewport should show an addition to the model (at least 14 walls total), not just modifications to the original 13 walls.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial FZK-Haus model contains exactly 13 walls. To successfully complete the task, the final model must have at least 14 walls (13 original + at least 1 new). The agent must use the BlenderBIM UI to assign the 'Status' property within 'Pset_WallCommon' to these walls: at least 8 as 'EXISTING', at least 1 internal wall as 'DEMOLISH', and the newly created wall(s) as 'NEW'. The final file must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_renovation_phased.ifc'.
